channel.title: FAU Cyber Security Club
channel.description: 👋 Welcome to the FAU Cyber Security Club Wiki! This wiki is currently underconstruction. If you would like to help me with it, contact me @solitude_freak or @shaamad on the Discord. Resources im using: hugo docs hugo relearn theme docs md cheetsheet

item.title: Introduction
item.description: This Wiki is where you can find quick information about the club and current events, as well as helpful resources and guides to help you get initalized. The main goal of this club is to create a fun and engaging environment to help students engage not only in learning more about cyber security and tech, but also to create a space of driven and passsionate people who are looking for community and connections.
